records.ety: [Ortho- + Gr. <?/ to turn: cf. F. orthotrope.]

defs: Having the axis of an ovule or seed straight from the hilum and chalaza to the orifice or the micropyle; atropous.
notes: ☞ This word has also been used (but improperly) to describe any embryo whose radicle points towards, or is next to, the hilum.
